core_rule: Do not flatten training lanes before they independently prove useful. Improve orchestration, context, eval, and routing first.

research_sources.name: Cursor Project Rules
research_sources.finding: Use versioned project rules in .cursor/rules as persistent scoped context.

research_sources.name: Cursor Background Agents
research_sources.finding: Background agents work asynchronously in isolated remote environments and separate branches, but auto-run increases exfiltration risk.

research_sources.name: Cursor Custom Modes
research_sources.finding: Different modes should map to task type: read-only planning, focused edits, autonomous refactors, or specialized workflows.

research_sources.name: Continue Config and Context Providers
research_sources.finding: Model routing, context providers, prompts, and rules can be declaratively configured.

research_sources.name: Aider Docs
research_sources.finding: Repo-map and architect/edit separation are useful patterns for local-first coding workflows.

research_sources.name: Anthropic Multi-Agent Research System
research_sources.finding: Use lead-agent plus specialized worker agents; improve tool ergonomics and measure task-completion impact.

research_sources.name: OpenAI Codex
research_sources.finding: Parallel cloud tasks in isolated environments work best with repo instructions and review before integration.

research_sources.name: GitHub Copilot Custom Agents
research_sources.finding: Specialized agents should have explicit behavior, expertise, and workflow boundaries.

feature_branches.name: cursor_project_rules_and_environment
feature_branches.goal: Make Cursor useful as a side-agent without letting it flatten training lanes or promote models.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Cursor opens repo with SCBE rules visible and safe tasks available.

feature_branches.name: training_run_ledger_as_control_plane
feature_branches.goal: Use the run ledger to decide whether artifacts become eval evidence, repair rows, ops data, or merge-readiness evidence.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: npm run training:run-ledger completes and lists platform-split work order.

feature_branches.name: agent_packet_ownership_contracts
feature_branches.goal: Generate small work packets with owner, allowed paths, blocked paths, tests, and return format for Cursor/Codex/Claude lanes.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: A packet can be assigned without risking shared-file collisions.

feature_branches.name: context_provider_index
feature_branches.goal: Build a repo-local index of exact context packs for training, proposals, browser ops, and model evals.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Agents retrieve exact file pointers instead of broad searching.

feature_branches.name: non_quantized_route_first_model_board
feature_branches.goal: Track route candidates separately from merge candidates and block quantized consolidation.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Every adapter has route status, eval status, and merge status as separate fields.

feature_branches.name: failure_to_repair_data_miner
feature_branches.goal: Convert failed executable outputs into targeted repair SFT rows with provenance.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Each failed category emits train/holdout repair rows and updates the ledger.

feature_branches.name: colab_interaction_to_operator_sft
feature_branches.goal: Convert Colab verification/blocker receipts into operator-agent-bus training examples.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Colab receipts become runnable command SFT records, not vague notes.

feature_branches.name: local_oss_agent_adapter
feature_branches.goal: Add Ollama/Continue/Aider-compatible local model routing for worst-case free-agent workflows.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: A local model can handle a bounded packet and return a validated diff or diagnosis.

feature_branches.name: agent_config_lint_gate
feature_branches.goal: Validate .cursor, AGENTS.md, Copilot, Codex, MCP, and VS Code task configs for stale or contradictory instructions.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: CI/local task flags broken agent config before agents silently ignore rules.

feature_branches.name: tool_ergonomics_metrics
feature_branches.goal: Measure whether better tool descriptions, tasks, and packet templates reduce agent failure time.
feature_branches.acceptance_gate: Each repeated agent failure category has a before/after metric.
